## How to Use

Skills are automatically available to AI assistants. Reference them by name:

```
@next-best-practices   ‚Äî Next.js patterns and conventions
@drizzle               ‚Äî Database schema and queries
@zod                   ‚Äî Validation and type-safe parsing
@shadcn-ui             ‚Äî UI components
@monorepo-management   ‚Äî Monorepo and workspace setup
```

---

## Updating Skills

```bash
npx skills update          # Update all skills
npx skills check           # Check for updates
node .agents/tools/agents-gen.mjs   # Regenerate docs from registry
```
